quotes: more than ~15% of running body text in any section
Bold is for **hierarchy and key takeaways, not decoration**.
bold at most: the heading(s), one key phrase or claim per paragraph
Never bold: entire paragraphs, footnotes/references, more than ~15% of running body text in any section

rules.rule_text: Bold styling is reserved for hierarchy and key takeaways, never for decoration. Bold at most one key phrase or claim per paragraph, and do not exceed approximately 15% of the running body text in any section.

quotes: Always bold: callout text per the callout specs (§1.7), statistical callout numbers, brand name within a benefit claim when it is the focal point of the sentence (first instance per section only).

rules.rule_text: Always bold callout text according to the specifications, statistical callout numbers, and the first instance of the brand name per section when it is the focal point of a benefit claim.

quotes: Never use bold + ALL CAPS + color emphasis simultaneously on the same string except in chart headlines and the campaign headline lockup. Pick at most two emphasis devices per element.

rules.rule_text: Pick at most two emphasis devices per element. Never combine bold, ALL CAPS, and color emphasis simultaneously on the same string except in chart headlines and the campaign headline lockup.
